description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a bare torso, wearing a wide-brimmed hat adorned with beads and goggles, and a necklace of large red beads. He has black knee-length shorts with a belt, a blue pouch, and a holster on his right thigh, as well as a dagger or knife on his left hip. His arms are decorated with armbands and a tattoo, and his back features a large, stylized purple tattoo. He wears black boots and a wristwatch, and his facial features include a mustache and a goatee. The figure's accessories and distinctive attire suggest a rugged, adventurous character.
description: A muscular adult male with a bare torso, wide-brimmed hat, shorts, boots, and multiple accessories including a necklace, armbands, and a back tattoo.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bare chest, necklace, hat with goggles, facial features, and accessories on the belt and arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the dagger on the hip, armband, and the profile of the hat and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the large purple tattoo on the back, the necklace draping behind, and the holster and pouches on the belt.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the blue pouch, wristwatch, and the side profile of the hat and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: wide-brimmed hat, knee-length shorts, belt with holster and pouch, armbands, necklace, wristwatch
